Merge branch 'branch-A-CodingStandard'
Merge branch 'branch-A-JavaDoc'

Cleaning code
Refactoring into packages. Not fully clean yet, so more work is needed to reduce dependencies of the packages.
cleaning JavaDocs
added junit test with StorageTest.java and TaskTest.java
Format Task.fromFileString switch-case indentation Format Task.toString switch-case indentation
Added Checklist to Gradle. Address Checklist errors for Lilith.java, Storage.java, Task.java, and Parser.java Address Checklist errors for StorageTest.java and TaskTest.java

Refactor project structure for GUI support: - Refactor Lilith.java to serve as JavaFX main app (GUI) while moving command line input (CLI) logic to LilithCli.java - Add Command.java to centralize command handling for both CLI and GUI - Introduce Config.java to store constants like data path, cheer link, and command strings - Update build.gradle: add JavaFX dependencies and set mainClass to lilith.Launcher - LilithCli.java handles CLI interactions using the same backend as GUI
Merge branch 'branch-A-CheckStyle'
Added CommandTest for unit testing with positive and negative scenarios. Refactor Command.handle to use trimmed and lowercase input for comparisons Changed JavaDocs description in Lilith.start
Update printToDialog method to accept varargs and append multiple lines to TextArea
Merge branch 'branch-A-Varargs'
Removed a comment line on Lilith.java

Added Assertions on Command.java to assert that userinput, tasklist, and storage is not null. Added Assertions on Command.java to assert the number of parts returned from parser when handling deadlines and events. Added exceptions to openCheerLink() in Command.java Removed .toString in Lilith.java when creating storage object, since DATA_PATH is already a string Added a JavaDoc line in Config.java.
Edited the assertions on the parts.length for deadline and event. This is to ensure that parser returns the correct number of parts.

Changed variable name in Task.setTask() from input to taskTypeInput Added assertions in Task.toFileString() as tasktype should not be null when this function is called. Moreover, inside the tasktype switch, assertion is added since the default case should not be possible.
Refactor Command.Java to make it more readable. Command.handle() now uses switch-cases and helper functions for most commands.

Refactor Task.java by adding formatDetail() for output handling. It replaces the old formattedStart and formattedEnd with Parser.formatDateTime, which already parses the output. Removed startDateTime and endDateTime variables, since Command.java already handles parsing the input times.
Refactor Command.java and Storage.javato use stream, saving code for readability
Merge pull request #1 from Astatyr/branch-A-Assertions
Merge branch 'master' into branch-A-CodeQuality
Merge branch 'master' into branch-A-Streams
Merge pull request #2 from Astatyr/branch-A-CodeQuality
commitResults.messageBody: A code quality: Critically examines the code and refactor

commitResults.messageTitle: Merge branch 'master' into branch-A-Streams
Merge pull request #3 from Astatyr/branch-A-Streams

Add C-Update feature: support editing existing tasks using commands Users can now update a task's name, deadline, or event times without deleting and re-adding the task. New command: update <index> [/name <name>] [/by <date>] [/from <date>] [/to <date>]
Add A-BetterGui: redesign GUI with chat bubbles and Lilith theme
commitResults.messageBody: Plain TextArea replaced with asymmetric chat bubble layout. User messages appear right-aligned in white, bot replies left-aligned in blue. Errors highlighted in red for visibility.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add pfp, name header, and app icon to GUI
commitResults.messageBody:
Bot messages now show a circular profile picture and red "Lilith" name header at the start of each reply series.
Updated app window icon.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add multi-bubble responses and image bubble.
commitResults.messageBody: Bot responses are split by double newlines <\n\n> into separate chat bubbles. Added </IMG> prefix to display images as bot messages.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add error handling for loadTasks and saveTasks in Storage and error handling for event tasks.
commitResults.messageBody:
Checks for surface permission denied errors distinctly from general IO failures.
An error will be raised if the input start date is later than the input end date.

commitResults.messageTitle: Added User Guide (README.md) and AI declaration (AI.md)
Added a representative image of the UI (UI.png) Added a simple README on the root folder to redirect the user to docs/README.md for user guide

Deleted unecessary or deprecated files (test.txt and data/test-lilith.txt) Added error handling on Command.handleTodo() to catch empty task name Updated docs/README.md to acknowledge source material behind the chatbot personality Edited Contributors.md
Added a line in README file. Renamed docs/UI.png to docs/Ui.png
Fix Ui.png image path in docs/README.md
Added links in the README that redirects to the release page at github

Add aa new config for Error handling (/ERROR) Added the Error handling to error messages at Command.java Refactor Lilith.java to check to detect for messages that starts with Error handling (/ERROR) and properlt shows it inthe message box Added a header to Lilith.java that contains the current date-time and a simple help button Added help.png under resources for the help button icon
Added HelpWindow to list all the commands at a separate window when the help button is clicked. Added lilith_nowords.png image when user input = no.
Edited createHeader() to align the datetime to the centre of the header and the help button to the right side of the header
Fix the datetime at createHeader() being offcentre due to lack of left-side padding to compensate for the help button
Updated docs/README.md and Ui.png to reflect the addition of the header. Edited Lilith.java and Storage.java in accordance to Gradle Checkstyle.
